requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Evidence Versus Bangladesh Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023证据与孟加拉国接受性
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023證據與孟加拉國接受性

summary.en: Bangladesh acceptance of China GB evidence must be confirmed through the exact BSTI, importer, tender, customs, utility, fire, insurer, owner, or contract route. Public sources do not support treating GB 44240-2024 or GB/T 36276-2023 as automatic Bangladesh whole-product BESS approval.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国是否接受中国GB证据，必须通过具体BSTI、进口商、招标、海关、电网、消防、保险、业主或合同路径确认。公开资料不支持将GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023视为自动孟加拉国BESS整机批准。
summary.zht: 孟加拉國是否接受中國GB證據，必須通過具體BSTI、進口商、招標、海關、電網、消防、保險、業主或合約路徑確認。公開資料不支持將GB 44240-2024或GB/T 36276-2023視為自動孟加拉國BESS整機批准。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh BSTI, customs, utility, fire, transport, and project requirements applicable to the exact shipment or site
IEC 62619:2022 or IEC 62933 where the Bangladesh route requests IEC evidence

summary.en: GB 44240-2024 is China-side mandatory (effective August 1, 2025) where its lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage scope applies. GB/T 36276-2023 is the current China-side recommended national standard for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage (replacing earlier editions). Ensure any China technical file references these current versions, not superseded editions.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024 在其电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池范围适用时属于中国侧强制要求（2025 年 8 月 1 日生效）。GB/T 36276-2023 是中国侧电力储能用锂离子电池现行推荐性国家标准（取代早期版本）。应确保任何中国技术文件引用这些现行版本，而非已废止版本。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024 在其電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池範圍適用時屬於中國側強制要求（2025 年 8 月 1 日生效）。GB/T 36276-2023 是中國側電力儲能用鋰離子電池現行推薦性國家標準（取代早期版本）。應確保任何中國技術文件引用這些現行版本，而非已廢止版本。

gap.en: Create a clause matrix from GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 to the Bangladesh-requested IEC, BSTI, fire, transport, grid, or project clauses, and mark which documents are technical evidence rather than local approval.
gap.zh: 应建立从GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023到孟加拉国要求的IEC、BSTI、消防、运输、并网或项目条款的条款矩阵，并标明哪些文件只是技术证据而非当地批准。
gap.zht: 應建立從GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023到孟加拉國要求的IEC、BSTI、消防、運輸、併網或項目條款的條款矩陣，並標明哪些文件只是技術證據而非當地批准。

mandatory_status.target: Not confirmed as a blanket Bangladesh whole-product BESS compulsory certification; mandatory only where the Bangladesh route, authority, importer, customs process, tender, insurer, utility, or contract requires or accepts the mapped evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory where its China scope applies; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended unless incorporated by project, contract, or authority route

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation Standard Public Service Platform

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 as China battery-safety baseline evidence, not as automatic Bangladesh BESS approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作为中国电池安全基线证据，而非自动孟加拉国BESS批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023作為中國電池安全基線證據，而非自動孟加拉國BESS批准。
